name: AnimeThemesSync
description:
Automatically download OP/ED videos from AnimeThemes.moe to upgrade your collection!
Key Features: - Precise Matching: Uses AniList/MyAnimeList IDs to ensure the correct anime. - Smart Tagging: Automatically adds season tags like 'Winter 2024'. - Direct Links: Quick access to the source pages on AnimeThemes.moe.
overview: Automatically downloads anime OP/ED themes from AnimeThemes.moe for your Jellyfin library.

versions.changelog:
## Highlights
- Added a persistent SQLite-backed Season Finder with paged browsing, mapping import/export, and automatic migration of existing season mappings.
- Added a live download queue with progress tracking, cancellation, completed-job history, segmented downloads, and configurable concurrency.
- Added video and audio previews with retry support and seekable playback.
## Reliability and UI Improvements
- Library Browser now refreshes its list, details, and summary immediately after downloads, mapping changes, and file deletions.
- Season Finder changes now update the related Library Browser series without reopening the page.
- Fixed Emby extra-file deletion failures caused by temporary file locks by releasing active playback and retrying safely.
- Improved API error messages and prevented stale responses from overwriting newer UI state.
## Upgrade Notes
- Existing `SeasonThemeMappings` are migrated automatically.
- No manual migration is required.

- Support selecting theme media outputs (theme and extra) individually
- Add customizable extras file suffix for better media server detection
- Fix duplicated or incorrect season one theme output paths

AnimeThemes Sync 2.1.0
- Library Browser now opens faster with an automatically maintained local cache.
- Added cache status, rebuild, clear, and legacy manifest import controls.
- Improved Jellyfin and Emby dashboard pages so cache setup happens in the background.
- Existing legacy extras manifests can be imported without deleting the old files.
- Removed the SQLite runtime dependency for better Emby compatibility.
- Improved generated file names so they are consistent across Windows and Linux.

- Improve AnimeThemes Browser library browsing and filtering
- Add integrated settings controls and clearer browser actions
- Improve saved media status display and sorting
- Improve mobile layouts and responsive controls
- Improve Jellyfin and Emby browser consistency

## Changes
- Fix inconsistent season matching status between Season Finder and Library Browser.
- Exclude Season 0 and Specials from season matching views.
- Improve Needs match display so resolved seasons are not shown as unmatched.

## Changes
- Add a plugin setting to enable or disable season-level theme downloads.
- Keep saved season mappings while skipping season output when season downloads are disabled.
- Publish the Jellyfin catalog thumbnail from GitHub Pages so Jellyfin can fetch it reliably.
- Remove local developer notes, IDE settings, and large sample files from the public repository.
- Expand ignore rules for generated artifacts, private notes, and AI instruction files.
Separate Jellyfin test port in VSCode tasks
